title: senecio webbii
intro: Senecio webbii, also known as Webb's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a bronchodilator and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and open airways. Senecio webbii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
